lesson_snippet.concept_explanation: Words are made of sounds. We can listen for the first sound we hear in a word.
lesson_snippet.visual_model: Picture cards paired with spoken words.
lesson_snippet.common_misconception: Naming the letter instead of identifying the sound.
lesson_snippet.real_world_connection: Listening to names and environmental sounds.
lesson_snippet.lesson_summary: Words begin with sounds we can hear and identify.

worked_example.problem: What beginning sound do you hear in sun?
worked_example.thinking_notes: We listen for sounds, not letter names.
worked_example.reflection_prompt: Can I hear the first sound again?

guided_practice.coaching_feedback: Listen to the start of the word.

next_practice_recommendation.reason: Converted planning artifact only; runtime pathway mapping pending.

source_metadata.source_file: Grade 1 English Production Reading Foundations Skill 2 Phonemic Awareness + Beginning Sounds
